note: Golden set for legal RAG (Phase 5). Retrieval eval only checks that the expected ĐIỀU is retrieved (recall@k) — separate from generation. `expect` names the governing document + article a correct answer must rest on. Preregister: metric = recall@5 at the article level; abstain cases must return zero relevant provisions. Curated from the seeded corpus (NĐ 31/2018, NĐ 128/2020, VBHN 96/VBHN-VPQH).
